---
output:
  github_document:
    number_sections: true
---

<!-- README.md is generated from README.Rmd. Please edit that file -->

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>",
  fig.path = "man/figures/README-",
  out.width = "100%"
)
```

```{r child = 'vignettes/my-vignette.Rmd'}
```
